eksClusterVersionEol.^description: EKS version end of life: {$COUNT} of your clusters are close to end of life. Please proceed to upgrade your cluster.
eksClusterVersionEol.shortDesc: EKS cluster version end of life

eksClusterVersionUpdate.^description: EKS new version: Newer version are available for {$COUNT} of your clusters. Please proceed to upgrade your cluster.

eksEndpointPublicAccess.^description: EKS public endpoint: {$COUNT} of your clusters have enabled public access for endpoint. Disable public access to minimize the security risks.

eksSecretsEncryption.^description: EKS secrets encryption: {$COUNT} of your clusters have disabled secrets encryption. Enable secrets encryption to protect your secrets in your clusters

eksClusterLogging.^description: EKS cluster logging: {$COUNT} of your clusters have disabled control plane logging. Enable control plane logging for better monitoring.

eksClusterSGRestriction.^description: EKS cluster security group: {$COUNT} of clusters' security groups have provided permission beyond minimal rules. Grant minimum rules to reduce security risks.
eksClusterSGRestriction.shortDesc: EKS cluster security group minimum rules

eksClusterRoleLeastPrivilege.^description: EKS role: {$COUNT} of clusters' roles have full access to one or more services.Grant only required permission to reduce the security risks.

eksNoManagedNodeGroups.^description: EKS managed node groups: {$COUNT} of your clusters have no managed node groups. Use managed node groups for automated provisioning and lifecycle management.

eksNodeGroupSingleAZ.^description: EKS node group availability: {$COUNT} of your node groups are deployed in a single availability zone. Deploy node groups across multiple AZs for high availability.

eksClusterLoggingIncomplete.^description: EKS control plane logging: {$COUNT} of your clusters have incomplete control plane logging. Enable all log types (api, audit, authenticator, controllerManager, scheduler) for comprehensive monitoring.

eksSecretsEncryptionNoKMS.^description: EKS secrets encryption: {$COUNT} of your clusters do not use customer-managed KMS keys for secrets encryption. Use customer-managed KMS keys for better control and compliance.
eksSecretsEncryptionNoKMS.shortDesc: No customer-managed KMS key for secrets

eksNoSpotInstances.^description: EKS Spot instances: {$COUNT} of your clusters have no node groups using Spot instances. Use Spot instances for fault-tolerant workloads to achieve significant cost savings.

eksNoKarpenter.^description: EKS Karpenter: {$COUNT} of your clusters do not have Karpenter add-on installed. Use Karpenter for efficient node provisioning and significant cost optimization.

eksAutoModeNotEnabled.^description: EKS Auto Mode: {$COUNT} of your clusters do not have Auto Mode enabled. Use Auto Mode for fully managed compute, networking, and storage to reduce operational overhead.

eksNoIRSAConfigured.^description: EKS IRSA: {$COUNT} of your clusters do not have OIDC provider configured for IAM Roles for Service Accounts. Use IRSA for pod-level IAM permissions instead of node-level roles.

eksNoAutoscaling.^description: EKS autoscaling: {$COUNT} of your clusters do not have autoscaling configured. Implement cluster autoscaling using Karpenter or node group autoscaling for cost optimization.

eksNoManagedStorageDrivers.^description: EKS storage drivers: {$COUNT} of your clusters do not have EBS or EFS CSI driver add-ons installed. Use managed storage drivers for persistent storage and data durability.
